channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Havertz sparks Germany's 7-1 rout of Curaçao after underdogs' historic 1st goal in World Cup
item.description: Kai Havertz scored two goals as Germany pulled away from World Cup first-timer Curaçao late in the opening half and piled on after that in a 7-1 win in a group match.
item.content:encoded:
Kai Havertz scored two goals as Germany pulled away from World Cup first-timer Curaçao late in the opening half and piled on after that in a 7-1 win in a group match.

(Image credit: Karen Warren)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Fate of historic slavery exhibit targeted by Trump hangs in the balance
item.description: A federal judge has temporarily blocked President Trump's order to remove some exhibits at national parks. One historic site targeted by that order faces an uncertain future.
item.content:encoded:
A federal judge has temporarily blocked President Trump's order to remove some exhibits at national parks. One historic site targeted by that order faces an uncertain future.

(Image credit: Adrian Florido)
item.dc:creator: Henry Larson

item.title: The U.S. and Iran announce a deal to end the war
item.description: President Trump said the U.S. would remove its blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump said the U.S. would remove its blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

(Image credit: Samuel Corum)
item.dc:creator: Michael Levitt

item.title: Former Republican Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell hospitalized
item.description: A spokesman for former Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell said the Kentucky republican was admitted to a hospital on Sunday.
item.content:encoded:
A spokesman for former Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell said the Kentucky republican was admitted to a hospital on Sunday.

(Image credit: Heather Diehl)
item.dc:creator: Eric McDaniel

item.title: 12 dead after skydiving plane crashes in Missouri, authorities say
item.description: Authorities say a pilot and 11 others were killed when a plane taking people on a skydiving outing crashed and caught fire in Missouri.
item.content:encoded:
Authorities say a pilot and 11 others were killed when a plane taking people on a skydiving outing crashed and caught fire in Missouri.

(Image credit: Reed Hoffmann)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: The U.S.-led war in Iran will dominate Trump's G7 trip to France
item.description: The gathering was originally expected to be a meeting focused on a variety of separate economic and security issues.
item.content:encoded:
The gathering was originally expected to be a meeting focused on a variety of separate economic and security issues.

(Image credit: YOAN VALAT/POOL)
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez

item.title: Here's who's missing at the World Cup: Soccer-playing grannies!
item.description: The World Cup isn't the only global soccer event of note. Check out the Grannies International Football Tournament.
item.content:encoded:
The World Cup isn't the only global soccer event of note. Check out the Grannies International Football Tournament.

(Image credit: Samantha Reinders for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Ryan Lenora Brown

item.title: Primary care doctors raise alarm as telehealth companies get involved in obesity drugs
item.description: Telehealth companies offer lifestyle support so people taking obesity drugs can have the most success losing weight. But employers also want the telehealth providers to limit spending on the drugs.
item.content:encoded:
Telehealth companies offer lifestyle support so people taking obesity drugs can have the most success losing weight. But employers also want the telehealth providers to limit spending on the drugs.

(Image credit: Lisa Wiseman for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Sydney Lupkin

item.title: Trump's UFC fights bring historic spectacle to White House
item.description: Seven cage fights will be held on the White House grounds in honor of the nation's upcoming 250th anniversary.
item.content:encoded:
Seven cage fights will be held on the White House grounds in honor of the nation's upcoming 250th anniversary.

(Image credit: ANNE LEBRETON)
item.dc:creator: Danielle Kurtzleben

item.title: Britain detains sanctioned oil tanker believed to be linked to Russia's shadow fleet
item.description: Britain is investigating a sanctioned tanker that is suspected of being part of the Russian "shadow fleet," shipping oil in violation of international sanctions over Moscow's war on Ukraine.
item.content:encoded:
Britain is investigating a sanctioned tanker that is suspected of being part of the Russian "shadow fleet," shipping oil in violation of international sanctions over Moscow's war on Ukraine.

(Image credit: Kin Cheung)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
